original_text:
### Brand Name & Trademark Usage
- Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials (patient marketing rule; supersedes the Feb 2026 general guide's title-case rule).
- Include the **® registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included** — i.e., LISRAYA® (brepocitinib). Apply on **first/most prominent mention only**, in **external-facing documents only**. Do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.
- Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.
- Parent company: Priovant Therapeutics, Inc. (sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections).

quotes: Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials
Include the **® registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included** — i.e., LISRAYA® (brepocitinib)
Apply on **first/most prominent mention only**, in **external-facing documents only**
Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`
generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`

rules.intent: Maintain strict, regulatory-compliant trademark presentation for LISRAYA.
rules.rule_text: Always write LISRAYA in ALL CAPS (case.campaign.all_caps = "all_caps") in patient marketing materials, superseding standard title-case guides. The registered trademark symbol ® must only be applied on the first or most prominent mention in external-facing documents, and only when paired with the generic name formatted in lowercase parentheses: LISRAYA® (brepocitinib). Subsequent mentions must omit the ® symbol.

quotes: Parent company: Priovant Therapeutics, Inc. (sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections).

rules.intent: Prevent duplicate parent company sign-offs outside of designated legal areas.
rules.rule_text: The parent company sign-off 'Priovant Therapeutics, Inc.' is locked to the footer. Do not add this mention in normal content sections of the email.
